title: taraxacum corpulentum
intro: Taraxacum corpulentum, also known as the fat dandelion, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Taraxacum corpulentum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including skin issues and respiratory problems.
